Metadata.title: NeuralCraft – AI Consulting for Businesses
Metadata.description: NeuralCraft partners with businesses of every size as a long-term technology partner, turning artificial intelligence into practical, measurable value.

HomePage.heroTitle: Artificial intelligence that moves the needle
HomePage.heroSubtitle: NeuralCraft builds AI strategies, agents, and automations that create real value for businesses of every size.
HomePage.servicesTitle: One partner, six levers for your AI success
HomePage.servicesSubtitle: From the first strategy session to a production AI system — we cover the full journey.
HomePage.processSubtitle: A clear, iterative process — not months of concept papers.
HomePage.caseStudiesSubtitle: A selection of representative projects — real client work is added continuously.
HomePage.ctaSubtitle: Let's talk through a free, no-obligation consultation to find where AI has the biggest leverage in your business.

measurable.title: Measurable value
measurable.description: Every project starts with a clear success metric — no experimenting on your budget.

partnership.title: Long-term partnership
partnership.description: We don't just ship a project — we stay for operations, iteration, and scaling.

practical.title: Practice over theory
practical.description: Working solutions in weeks, not year-long strategy decks that never ship.

accessible.title: Built for any company size
accessible.description: From trade businesses to mid-market — solutions that fit your budget and scale.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: We understand your processes, data, and goals — on-site or remote.

strategize.title: Strategize
strategize.description: Together we build a prioritized AI roadmap with clear milestones.

build.title: Build
build.description: Our team develops and integrates the solution — from agents to automation.

scale.title: Scale
scale.description: We optimize, train your team, and expand the solution with intent.

strategy.title: AI Strategy & Consulting
strategy.description: Analysis of existing processes and a prioritized roadmap for AI adoption.
strategy.lead: Before we write a single line of code, we make sure we understand where AI actually moves the needle in your business.

highlights.point1: Process analysis and identification of the highest-impact use cases
highlights.point2: Prioritized roadmap with realistic effort estimates
highlights.point3: Clear success metrics defined before the project starts

agenticAi.title: Agentic AI Solutions
agenticAi.description: Custom AI agents for customer service, knowledge management, and internal processes.
agenticAi.lead: We build AI agents that don't just respond — with real tool access, they act on their own within clearly defined boundaries.

highlights.point1: Integration with existing systems (CRM, inventory, internal tools)
highlights.point2: Clear escalation logic — the agent knows when to hand off to a human
highlights.point3: Ongoing monitoring and iteration after go-live

automation.title: Workflow Automation
automation.description: Automating recurring business processes with AI and no-/low-code tools.
automation.lead: We automate recurring processes wherever it pays off — using the right tool for the job, not a fixed dogma.

highlights.point2: Seamless integration with existing systems and data sources
highlights.point3: Scales from individual sub-steps to complex, end-to-end workflows

chatbots.title: Chatbots & AI Assistants
chatbots.description: Intelligent assistants for your website, customer service, and internal tools.
chatbots.lead: Assistants that resolve real requests, instead of just repeating FAQ answers.

highlights.point1: Available around the clock, via website, WhatsApp, or internal tools
highlights.point2: Seamless handoff to human staff whenever needed
highlights.point3: Continuously improves from real customer conversations

aiCoding.title: AI Coding & Software Development
aiCoding.description: AI-powered web applications, internal tools, and platforms for your business.
aiCoding.lead: We build the software foundation your AI solutions run on in production — clean, maintainable, and built to scale.

highlights.point1: Modern, maintainable architecture instead of technical debt
highlights.point2: From internal tools to customer-facing platforms
highlights.point3: Works closely alongside your existing team where needed

training.title: AI Training & Workshops
training.description: Hands-on workshops that turn your team into confident AI users.
training.lead: Technology only pays off if your team can use it confidently — knowledge transfer is part of every project we run.

highlights.point1: Hands-on workshops instead of dry theory
highlights.point2: Tailored to your actual tools and processes
highlights.point3: Enables your team to keep improving after the project ends

ServicesPage.title: Six levers for your AI success
ServicesPage.lead: From the first strategy session to a production AI system — we cover the full journey.

manufacturing.title: AI-assisted quote generation
manufacturing.description: An AI agent reads technical inquiries, matches them against the product catalog, and drafts a ready-to-send quote.

craft.title: Automated appointment coordination
craft.result: 3 fewer hours on the phone per employee, per week
craft.description: A chat assistant handles customer inquiries, checks capacity, and suggests matching appointment slots around the clock.

consulting.title: Automated document review
consulting.result: +40% faster first-pass review of submitted documents
consulting.description: A workflow extracts relevant figures from submitted documents and flags anomalies for manual review.
